subject: WM-0160 review: verified
body: Verified WM-0160 after Keystone follow-up. Prior listener cleanup blocker is fixed by snapshotting ordinary, reliable, and lifecycle listener emits; concurrent wait and drain helpers settle on shared UiDelta, destroy, and shutdown. Public API remains root sim-worker with thin Web adapter aliases only; no product UI changes, new protocol message family, timer loop, singleton, sim-core import in apps/web, or deep import. Focused Vitest, Chromium worker-smoke, typecheck, boundaries, sim-run, validate-handoff, taskctl validate/status, and git diff --check pass.
